CustomField.description: DISABLES the RelationshipContacts.trigger (Contact, after delete) - checking this box will disable a trigger. This can cause erratic and unpredictable behavior in your NPSP. FOR ADVANCED CONSULTANT AND DEVELOPERS ONLY.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DISABLES the RelationshipContacts.trigger (Contact, after delete) - checking this box will disable a trigger. This can cause erratic and unpredictable behavior in your NPSP. FOR ADVANCED CONSULTANT AND DEVELOPERS ONLY.
CustomField.label: DISABLE_RelationshipContacts_trigger
